content_fingerprint: xai launches api playground for grok 4 20 expands voice and image apis xai has updated its api reference page with a new playground interface for grok 4 20 alongside expanded voice and image generation tools xai has updated its public api reference page introducing a playground interface for its flagship grok 4 20 language model the playground is described as coming soon and will allow developers to interactively test the model through the xai developer portal grok 4 20 is positioned by xai as the most truth seeking large language model in the world with support for a 1 million token context w
